com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom

Interface IXOperationParametersSerializer


  • public interface IXOperationParametersSerializer
    This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which manages its own parameters and provides a serialized version of those for Capital to handle their persistence.

    Please refer to the SBOM programmer’s guide (CustomSBOMOperationDevelopment.pdf) for more information about SBOM generation and management.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void deSerialize(java.lang.String parameters)
      Operation consumed string representation for all its parameter values.
      java.lang.String serialize()
      Operation provided string representation for all its parameter values.

    • Method Detail

      • serialize

        java.lang.String serialize()
        Operation provided string representation for all its parameter values. This string is used for persisting those parameters along with the operation in the SBOM pattern.
        Returns:
        A string representation of this operation parameter values

      • deSerialize

        void deSerialize(java.lang.String parameters)
          throws java.text.ParseException
        Operation consumed string representation for all its parameter values. This string is passed to the operation to build its internal parameters when loaded.
        Parameters:
        parameters - A string representation of this operation parameter values
        Throws:
        java.text.ParseException - This operation failed to parse the parameters string
